forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 67. North wind around 3 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. Northeast wind 3 to 7 mph.

weather_report:
As the early hours of Saturday dawn on Boston, a gentle symphony of stillness envelops the city, whispering promises of warmth to come. The night sky, draped in a mysterious shroud, lends a sense of serenity even amidst the twinkling lights of the surrounding urban landscape. With the temperatures resting comfortably around 67, the air carries a delicate caress from the north at just a breath of wind, a quiet prelude to a day that hints at brightness.

Come morning, vibrant hues will reclaim the stage, unfurling into a mostly sunny tableau with temperatures climbing toward a pleasing 83. It beckons passersby to throw open their windows and draw in the fragrant whispers of summer. In such conditions, one might favor lightweight, breathable fabrics; perhaps a soft cotton shirt paired with relaxed shorts to embrace the sun without succumbing to the heat. A stroll along the Charles River, with the gentle lap of water as a backdrop, or a leisurely visit to a local market seems fitting for a day like this. Savoring an artisanal coffee on a sun-kissed patio may very well be the perfect prelude to a relaxed afternoon.

As summer unfolds, so too do opportunities to bask in its warmth—just be sure to carry a light layer for the evening, when the temperature kisses the coolness of night once more, inviting the stars to dance their eternal waltz above.
